Properties.AlarmDescription: Alert when patient-portal Lambda has errors
Alert when patient-portal Lambda is throttled
Alert when patient-portal Lambda p99 duration exceeds 24000ms (~80% of timeout)
Alert when public-appttypes Lambda has errors
Alert when public-appttypes Lambda is throttled

PatientPortalLambdaArn.Description: ARN of the patient portal Lambda function (representative)

SessionTableName.Description: Name of the patient session table

SmsLogTableName.Description: Name of the SMS log table

PatientPortalApiUrl.Description: URL of the dedicated patient portal API

BootstrapVersion.Description: Version of the CDK Bootstrap resources in this environment, automatically retrieved from SSM Parameter Store. [cdk:skip]

Assertions.AssertDescription: CDK bootstrap stack version 6 required. Please run 'cdk bootstrap' with a recent version of the CDK CLI.
